Home › Services › Business Advisory

Business Advisory Services in Mumbai

Business advisory covers strategic and financial guidance beyond compliance — tax planning, transaction support, due diligence, and outsourced CFO services. We work with businesses across Mumbai to support decisions and growth.

Advisory engagements are tailored to the business — from structuring and tax efficiency within the law, to financial reporting support and management information. We provide advisory only in areas permitted to Chartered Accountants in practice.

What is the process?

  1. Understand the business, its goals, and the decision at hand.
  2. Analyse financials, tax position, and options.
  3. Recommend a course of action with the trade-offs explained.
  4. Support implementation and ongoing review.

What documents are required?

  • Recent financial statements
  • Tax returns and assessments
  • Details of the transaction or decision
  • Management accounts / projections (if available)
Typical timelineScoped per engagement and agreed in advance.
FeesFees are engagement-based. Contact us for a quote.

Advisory is provided within the scope permitted to members in practice under ICAI regulations.

Request a quote

Frequently asked questions

What does business advisory include?
It includes tax planning, transaction support, due diligence, and outsourced CFO/financial reporting support — guidance beyond routine compliance, within the scope permitted to Chartered Accountants.
Do you provide CFO services?
Yes. We offer outsourced CFO and financial-controller support, including management reporting and financial oversight, scoped to the engagement.
Can you help with due diligence for a transaction?
Yes. We carry out financial and tax due diligence to help you understand risks before a transaction.
